truthSpec.title: Leaderboard Ranking
truthSpec.overview: Implement a leaderboard ranking system that sorts players by score with specific tiebreaking rules.

requirements.text: Accept an array of player objects with: name, score, gamesPlayed
Sort players by score in descending order (highest first)
For tied scores, rank by fewest games played first (efficiency tiebreaker)
For ties in both score and games, sort alphabetically by name
Assign rank numbers (1-based) — tied players get the same rank, next rank skips

edgeCases: All players tied: rank by games, then alphabetically
Multiple ties at different score levels
truthSpec.testSummary: 5 tests covering: basic sorting, efficiency tiebreaker, alphabetical tiebreaker, rank numbering with skips, and empty input.

aiBrief.title: Leaderboard Ranking
aiBrief.overview: Implement a leaderboard ranking system that sorts players and assigns rankings.
requirements: Accept an array of player objects with: name, score, gamesPlayed
Sort players by score in descending order (highest first)
Return sorted array with rank field added

flaws.description: Brief omits the efficiency tiebreaker (fewest games played wins ties)
Brief says 'sort efficiently' which the AI may interpret as algorithm performance rather than the tiebreaker rule. Also omits alphabetical fallback.
